current.summary: MOAT spec issue #8 resolved with locked design decisions; README rewritten; repo metadata updated; all changes pushed.

activeWork.description: MOAT specification revision - issue #8 revocation mechanisms and ecosystem documentation
activeWork.progress: Issue #8 fully resolved with locked decisions 3-5 (compromised hard-block, unreachable feed fail-open, revoked_at registry-asserted). OWASP alignment fixed. Added open issues #9-#14 with clear scope. Rewrote README from scratch. Updated repo description to protocol-focused one-liner. Added link to moat-revised-outline.md in moat-spec.md. All changes committed and pushed.

git.lastCommit: README rewrite and repo metadata updates

recentDecisions: Decision 3: compromised status is hard block with no override capability
Decision 4: unreachable feed fails open with explicit warning requirements
Decision 5: revoked_at is registry-asserted with no skew window
nextSteps: No urgent work - spec is in clean, complete state
Future: tackle open issues #9-#14 (identity-bound revocation, publisher auth, federation security, algorithm deprecation, offline verification, cross-registry blocklist)

context.notes: MOAT spec repository fully updated and production-ready. Issue #8 (revocation mechanisms) comprehensively resolved with adversarial-review-validated design decisions. Open issues #9-#14 are well-scoped, self-contained, and ready for future sessions. Working outline at docs/moat-revised-outline.md is authoritative pre-v0.4.0.
